---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for BitChat
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider and why were they ruled out?

## Architecture Impact
Which layers of the codebase would this affect?
- [ ] Domain (entities)
- [ ] Port (interfaces)
- [ ] Use Case (business logic)
- [ ] Infrastructure (adapters)
- [ ] Bridge (FFI/JNI)

## Additional Context
Any mockups, diagrams, references, or related projects.
